rows.label: qev035601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah... Guh!
I still can't walk... huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hm...?
You're... [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Aah... You came at just the right time!
At this rate, Captain Slovity is going to do
something irreversible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev035601_SEL0011
rows.name: Show concern for the injured Trigo.

rows.label: qev035601_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev035601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what happened.

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0004
rows.name:
You're kind...
But my situation doesn't matter right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0005
rows.name:
This is a problem that concerns the survival
of our Team Slovity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0006
rows.name:
It happened suddenly during a training exercise...
Captain Slovity suddenly went berserk
and attacked us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0007
rows.name:
After that, she disappeared toward the northern mountains...
And now, she's attacking the BLADEs who come to investigate,
one after another...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Even though we finally left the Growth
and got used to living here...
This is going to ruin everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0009
rows.name:
That should be something Captain Slovity
doesn't want either...
There must definitely be... some reason for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Please...
Stop Captain Slovity with your power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm glad I called out to you...
The Captain said that if anything ever happened to her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0012
rows.name: We should rely on [ST:playername ]...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035601_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you will definitely answer Slovity's trust.

rows.label: qev035601_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev035601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask where Slovity will appear.

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Thank you.
It seems the Captain's thoughts were correct after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0014
rows.name:
The Captain has recently been wearing a new type of suit
she bought from an Earthling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0015
rows.name:
She's become so strong that even if we attacked her in a group,
we wouldn't stand a chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0016
rows.name:
But if it's you, I'm sure... you'll be fine, right?
Head to the Castaway Cavern.
It seems she's using that area as her stronghold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Word is she's appearing at the Castaway Cavern, but...
Please be careful on your way there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0018
rows.name:
The Captain has recently been wearing a new type of suit
she bought from an Earthling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0019
rows.name:
She's become much, much stronger
than when she fought you before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0020
rows.name:
The power of the Captain enhanced by that new suit
is terrifying...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0021
rows.name:
She blew away several Bias who leaped at her,
dodged all our bullets...
Even grouped up, we were no match for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0022
rows.name:
You're the only one who can stop her.
I'm counting on you, head to the Castaway Cavern.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Because you were taking a long time to return,
everyone readied their equipment
and went out to look for you and the Captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0024
rows.name:
It seems you missed each other, but...
I'm truly glad you're safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Phew.
Now, if only this Tree Clan man
would quiet down, everything would be resolved, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0026
rows.name:
Right after you left,
that Earthling came back...
And he sold us suits for everyone at a cheap price.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0027
rows.name:
Thinking that with these, they could
bring the Captain back,
everyone put on the suits and left in high spirits...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0028
rows.name:
Guh... What was I doing...
while the Captain was away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0029
rows.name:
Everyone... returned
without a single one missing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0030
rows.name: Thank you, you really are amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0031
rows.name: I see... So several of our comrades died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035601_MSG0032
rows.name:
They were comrades who adored Captain Slovity
and left the Growth together with us...
We must mourn them respectfully.[ST:wait ]
